title: Are you planning to host your application/workload within the TCS managed cloud environment operated by the DIS/Platform team?
fail_message: DIS Managed Cloud onboarding is only for workloads hosted within the TCS managed cloud environment.

title: Is your project a TCS internal organization-managed project/application?
note: External clients cannot be onboarded directly.
fail_message: Only TCS internal organization-managed projects are eligible. External clients cannot be onboarded directly.

title: Does your project require any of the following? (Select all that apply)
fail_message: Customer-owned setups, customer-managed subscriptions, and third-party managed environments are strictly prohibited on DIS Managed Cloud.

title: Do you require support for the procurement of on-premise servers/infrastructure?
note: On-premise procurement is outside the scope of the cloud/platform team.
fail_message: On-premise server procurement is outside the scope of the DIS/Platform team and cannot be supported through this onboarding.

title: Migration of Existing Resources: Are you looking to migrate existing cloud resources or environments directly into the DIS managed cloud?
note: Direct migration of existing external/project resources is not allowed.
fail_message: Direct migration of existing external/project cloud resources into DIS Managed Cloud is not allowed.

title: Green-Field Deployment: Can you confirm that all infrastructure and services will be built from scratch in accordance with organization-approved architecture standards, deployment pipelines, and templates?
fail_message: All DIS Managed Cloud deployments must be green-field, using approved architecture standards, pipelines, and templates.
